text:
On Thu, 9 Jul 2009 01:28:03 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of net/p5-Net-LDAP-LDAPhash,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/136550 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/136550
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Sure. Looks fine.

Just never updated this as I've never seen a reason to myself as the
only changes affect CPAN.
